zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Turenne於大約1190年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫時，她的父親Raymond II de TURENNE48歲，母親Hélise de ROUERGUE42歲。她於大約1210年與Ebles V de VENTADOUR在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年5月12日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷姆斯-文塔度爾享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Turenne于大约1190年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫时，她的父亲Raymond II de TURENNE48岁，母亲Hélise de ROUERGUE42岁。她于大约1210年与Ebles V de VENTADOUR在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年5月12日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷姆斯-文塔度爾享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turenne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Normand, Donat, Emile, Francois, Philomene, Serge, Yves.
French: habitational name from Turenne, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France, e.g. in Corrèze, named with pre-Latin tur ‘height’.
History: Pierre Blanchard dit Turenne from Poitiers in Vienne, France, married Gertrude-Michelle Dupuis in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1733.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Turenne was born about 1190, in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Raymond II de TURENNE, was 48 and her mother, Hélise de ROUERGUE, was 42. She married Ebles V de VENTADOUR about 1210, in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 12 May 1263, in Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Turenne est née environ 1190, à Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Raymond II de TURENNE, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Hélise de ROUERGUE, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Ebles V de VENTADOUR environ 1210, à Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1263, à Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Turenne um 1190 in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raymond II de TURENNE 48 und ihre Mutter Hélise de ROUERGUE 42. Sie hat um 1210 in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Ebles V de VENTADOUR geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1263 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Turenne è nata il circa 1190 nel Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Raymond II de TURENNE, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Hélise de ROUERGUE, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Ebles V de VENTADOUR circa 1210, nel Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 maggio 1263, nel Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Turenneが約1190年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズトゥレンで生まれた時，父Raymond II de TURENNEは48歳，母Hélise de ROUERGUEは42歳であった。約1210年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズトゥレンでEbles V de VENTADOURと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年5月12日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズモウスティエル-ベンタドウルで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Turenne(이)가 대략 1190년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 터렌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raymond II de TURENNE(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hélise de ROUERGUE(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1210년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 터렌에서 Ebles V de VENTADOUR(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 5월 12일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 모우스티-븐타다어에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Turenne nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Raymond II de TURENNE, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Hélise de ROUERGUE, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Ebles V de VENTADOUR aproximadamente 1210, em Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1263, em Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Turenne родилась около 1190 г. в местности туренн, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Raymond II de TURENNE было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Hélise de ROUERGUE, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ebles V de VENTADOUR около 1210 г. в местности туренн, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 мая 1263 г. в местности мустиир-вентадоур, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Turenne nació aproximadamente 1190, en Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Raymond II de TURENNE, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Hélise de ROUERGUE, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Ebles V de VENTADOUR aproximadamente 1210, en Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1263, en Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 74 años.
